seoTitle: Tenindewa vs Tenterden — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Tenindewa and Tenterden. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Tenindewa and Tenterden.
heading: Tenindewa vs Tenterden — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Tenindewa, Western Australia and Tenterden, Western Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Tenindewa has a lower overall climate risk score (33/100) compared to Tenterden (47/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Tenindewa or Tenterden safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Tenindewa has a flood risk score of 59/100, while Tenterden scores 56/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Tenindewa scores 36/100 for bushfire risk. Tenterden scores 58/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Tenindewa or Tenterden?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Tenindewa has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.48% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
